scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,react,angular -c cyan,blue,red "pnpm --filter @mfe-demo/backend dev" "pnpm --filter @mfe-demo/react-mfe dev" "pnpm --filter @mfe-demo/angular-mfe dev"
scripts.dev:fed: concurrently -n backend,react,angular -c cyan,blue,red "pnpm --filter @mfe-demo/backend dev" "pnpm --filter @mfe-demo/react-mfe dev:fed" "pnpm --filter @mfe-demo/angular-mfe dev:fed"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @mfe-demo/domain build && pnpm --filter @mfe-demo/react-mfe build && pnpm --filter @mfe-demo/angular-mfe build
